zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Peavey Jr於大約1645年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯時，他的父親Rev Thomas Peavey Sr22歲，母親Jane Walford23歲。他和Martha Eaton至少有2個兒子。他去世於1720年9月9日在他的家鄉享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peavey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Scottish: unexplained. Compare   Peavy  .
History: Edward Peavey is mentioned in the records of Portsmouth, NH, in1691, as well as Abell, Nathaniel, Joseph, William, and Peter Peavey(probably his sons).

variants.name: Pevey
meanings: Scottish or English: unexplained. Compare   Peavey  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Peavey Jr was born about 1645, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, Rev Thomas Peavey Sr, was 22 and his mother, Jane Walford, was 23. He had at least 2 sons with Martha Eaton. He died on 9 September 1720, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Martha Eaton. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1720, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Peavey Jr è nato il circa 1645 nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Rev Thomas Peavey Sr, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Jane Walford, aveva 23 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Peavey Jrが約1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスで生まれた時，父Rev Thomas Peavey Srは22歳，母Jane Walfordは23歳であった。彼はMartha Eatonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1720年9月9日に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Peavey Jr(이)가 대략 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rev Thomas Peavey Sr(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Walford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Martha Eaton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1720년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Peavey Jr родился около 1645 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Rev Thomas Peavey Sr было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Walford, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Martha Eaton. Он умер 9 сентября 1720 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Peavey Jr nació aproximadamente 1645, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Rev Thomas Peavey Sr, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Jane Walford, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Martha Eaton. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1720, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
